goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 10:30' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'attraction type', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 10:30 and should go to stevenage
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east
Make sure you get entrance fee, attraction type, and postcode
